groups.title: Sorting
groups.description: Control how vehicles are ordered inside the original vehicle menu.

groups.title: Experimental
groups.description: Advanced options. Leave disabled unless you need them.

Enabled.label: Enable Mod
Enabled.description: Enable or disable Better Vehicle Menu completely.

ShowOverlay.label: Show Vehicle Buttons
ShowOverlay.description: Show the department vehicle buttons on screen.

EnableVehicleSorting.label: Sort Vehicle List
EnableVehicleSorting.description: Sort vehicles in the original vehicle menu by name.

EnablePassiveRefresh.label: Refresh Vehicle Menu on Timer
EnablePassiveRefresh.description: Automatically refresh the vehicle menu cache on a timer.

EnableChangeWatcher.label: Detect Vehicle/Base Changes
EnableChangeWatcher.description: Detect when vehicles or bases changed, then refresh once after things settle.

ChangeCheckIntervalSeconds.label: Change Detection Interval
ChangeCheckIntervalSeconds.description: Seconds between lightweight vehicle/base change checks.

ChangeRefreshDebounceSeconds.label: Wait Before Refreshing Changes
ChangeRefreshDebounceSeconds.description: After a change is detected, wait this many seconds before doing the full refresh.

ShortcutAnchor.label: Screen Corner
ShortcutAnchor.description: Choose which screen corner the vehicle menu buttons are attached to.

ShortcutButtonSize.label: Button Size
ShortcutButtonSize.description: Changes the height of each vehicle menu button.

ShortcutRightOffset.label: Horizontal Offset
ShortcutRightOffset.description: Moves the vehicle menu buttons horizontally away from the selected corner.

ShortcutBottomOffset.label: Vertical Offset
ShortcutBottomOffset.description: Moves the vehicle menu buttons vertically away from the selected corner.

ShortcutAspectRatio.label: Button Width
ShortcutAspectRatio.description: Changes button width. Higher values make the vehicle image cards wider.

UseResolutionScaling.label: Auto Scale by Resolution
UseResolutionScaling.description: Keeps the vehicle menu buttons visually similar across different screen resolutions.

ShowDebugOverlay.label: Debug Overlay
ShowDebugOverlay.description: Show diagnostic scan information in the upper right corner.

ReloadConfigHotkey.label: Reload Hotkey
ReloadConfigHotkey.description: Optional hotkey to reload config, icons, and the base cache while in-game. Leave empty to disable.

EnableMenuResearchLogging.label: Menu Research Logging
EnableMenuResearchLogging.description: Log original vehicle menu discovery details. Only useful for mod development.

TraceVehicleOverviewMethods.label: Vehicle Menu Method Trace
TraceVehicleOverviewMethods.description: Log original VehicleOverview methods. Only useful for mod development.
